stemHtml: An aircraft glides at the V(L/D)MAX in still air conditions. What action must be taken regarding the speed, if the pilot intends to fly maximum ground range, after experiencing a headwind during the glide?

options.a: He has to maintain his speed.
options.b: He has to increase his speed.
options.c: He has to decrease his speed.
options.d: There is too little data to answer the question.
